title: Just REI
description: Every modpack player knows the importance of REI. This pack just contains REI to give a nearly vanilla experience, the only difference from vanilla is that there is REI.
body:
**Every** modpack player knows the importance of REI. This pack just contains REI to give a nearly vanilla experience, the only difference from vanilla is that there is REI.


**That's it.**


Just REI only has the 1 mod REI (all credit to me). This modpack is almost entirely vanilla and all it does is allow for the searching up of recipes without leaving the game's GUI. This does not affect any of the vanilla mechanics at all, and only affects the visuals when inside of GUIs like the crafting table and the inventory. This pack is just an easier way to start using REI in your vanilla worlds and servers as manually setting up a modpack locally takes a bit of effort, time, and a slight bit of knowledge.
